name: Vim
goal: Edit text efficiently using Vim for real daily work
units: Unit 1: Modal Editing - normal, insert, visual, command modes
Unit 2: Moving Around - h/j/k/l, w/b/e, 0/$/gg/G, f/t
Unit 3: Editing Operations - d, c, y, p, u, Ctrl-R, dot repeat
Unit 4: Text Objects - iw, aw, i(/a(, i"/a", ci/di/yi patterns
Unit 5: Visual Mode - v, V, Ctrl-V, selecting and operating
Unit 6: Search and Replace - /, ?, n/N, :%s/old/new/g, flags
Unit 8: Configuration - vimrc basics, key remaps, plugins intro
